seoTitle: Sultana Point vs Sunlands — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sultana Point and Sunlands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sultana Point vs Sunlands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sultana Point and Sunlands.
heading: Sultana Point vs Sunlands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sultana Point, South Australia and Sunlands, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunlands has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Sultana Point (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sultana Point or Sunlands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sultana Point has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Sunlands scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sultana Point scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Sunlands scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sultana Point or Sunlands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunlands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
